name: novel-writer
description: A Codex plugin for serialized novel planning, drafting, revision, update cadence, and continuity tracking.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, draft, revise, and sustain serialized fiction.
interface.longDescription: A focused writing companion for serialized novelists. It helps develop premises, worlds, characters, arcs, chapter directions, prose drafts, polishing passes, revision checks, reader recaps, long-running continuity notes, one-click local Codex calls, and optional OpenAI-compatible model calls through a local web control panel.
defaultPrompt: Turn this serialized novel idea into a season plan and first five chapter hooks.
Draft the next update while preserving character voice, reader momentum, and continuity.
Review this chapter for pacing, hook strength, payoff timing, contradictions, and release readiness.
